title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Ms. Sharon Dell B. Paras As Consultant for Human Resource Strategies with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Fifty Thousand Pesos (P 50,000.00) Councilor Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap 01/23/2023
